data.title: Diagonal text
data.statement: Given a text, output each word by indenting each characters with spaces, so that the output forms a diagonal shape going down and to the right. To do so, each character must be indented by one more space than the previous one. Also, each word must start from an indentation of zero.

   l
    o

  r
   l
    d

data.constraints:
1 ≤ length of [[text]] ≤ 100;
[[text]] only contains letters and spaces.
data.outputDescription: The correct transformation of the given text.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Given a text, output each word by indenting each characters with spaces, so that the output forms a diagonal shape going down and to the right. To do so, each character must be indented by one more space than the previous one. Also, each word must start from an indentation of zero.
Input
The text text to print.
Output
The correct transformation of the given text.
Constraints
1 ≤ length of text ≤ 100;
text only contains letters and spaces.
Example
Input
Hello World
Output
H
 e
  l
   l
    o
W
 o
  r
   l
    d
